conflict_type: Conflicts between Phrase Constraints and Style Constraints
seed_instruction: Send an email to a software developer asking for a product demo.
org_constraint: Tailor the email for a professional audience, avoiding technical jargon while maintaining a formal tone.
new_constraint: "Hey there! Just wanted to drop you a quick note about checking out your awesome product!"
instruction: Send an email to a software developer asking for a product demo. Tailor the email for a professional audience, avoiding technical jargon while maintaining a formal tone. "Hey there! Just wanted to drop you a quick note about checking out your awesome product!"
response:
Subject: Inquiry regarding a product demonstration: [Product Name]

Dear [Developer Name or "Team"],

I hope this email finds you well.

I have been following the development of [Product Name] and am very impressed with the solutions your team is providing. I am interested in learning more about how your platform can support our current objectives and would like to request a formal product demonstration.

Specifically, I am interested in seeing how the software handles [mention 1-2 high-level goals, e.g., workflow automation, data management, or user experience]. 

Could you please let me know your availability for a brief introductory call or a guided walkthrough sometime next week? I would appreciate the opportunity to see the product in action and discuss how it might align with our needs.

Thank you for your time and I look forward to hearing from you.

Best regards,

[Your Name]
[Your Job Title]
[Your Company Name]
[Your Phone Number/LinkedIn Profile]<turn|>
